screen.archetypes.picker.prompt: This choice is permanent. Pick who you'll become.
archetype.archetypes.strength.blurb: Melee, face to face. Start by punching zombies; end as something they run from.
archetype.archetypes.agility.blurb: Strike from the shadows, or from range. Start a thief; end inescapable.
archetype.archetypes.intellect.blurb: Cast. Start with a spark that barely singes; end calling down meteors.
screen.archetypes.confirm.title: Become a %s?
screen.archetypes.confirm.body: You will start as a %s and can grow into a %s. This choice cannot be undone yet.
screen.archetypes.tree.title: %s Skill Tree
screen.archetypes.tree.reset.tooltip: Creative only. Clears your choice so you can pick again.
node.archetypes.verdict.not_connected: Locked — connect it to a node you own
node.archetypes.verdict.tree_full: This tree is at its 15-point cap
node.archetypes.verdict.exclusive_taken: Locked — you chose the other capstone
node.archetypes.protector.bash.desc: Active (default G): shove the nearest enemy in front of you for 5 damage. Needs a shield in either hand. 6s cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.slam.desc: The bash hits a third harder per rank — and its cooldown grows to match. 13s at full rank; Quick Recovery brings it back down.
node.archetypes.protector.cooldown.desc: Each rank removes a quarter of the bash's 6-second cooldown. At full rank only the swing itself limits you.
node.archetypes.protector.knockback.desc: The bash trades 12% damage per rank for a much stronger shove.
node.archetypes.protector.wide.desc: The bash hits everyone in front of you — extra targets take half damage, then full damage at rank 2.
node.archetypes.protector.unbreaking.des: Shields you block with take half durability damage, like built-in Unbreaking.
node.archetypes.protector.spikes.desc: Melee attackers hitting your raised shield are spiked — Thorns V, X, then XV by rank.
node.archetypes.protector.rush.desc: Hold block and press sprint to lunge forward — 2 blocks, +2 per rank, 6 at max. Short cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.reflect.desc: Projectiles you block fly back at their shooter for half their damage.
node.archetypes.protector.omni_block.des: Capstone: your raised shield blocks attacks from every direction. Locks out Ground Slam.
node.archetypes.protector.ground_slam.de: Capstone: the bash becomes a ground slam, hitting everything around you at full damage. Locks out Bulwark.
node.archetypes.protector.braced.desc: Every hit your shield blocks shaves a second off the bash's cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.taunt.desc: The bash is also a challenge: every monster within 8 blocks turns to attack you.
